description: A payment in an ACH payment run has been rejected by the bank due to incorrect vendor banking information.

nodes.task_description: Receive the ACH rejection notification from the bank.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent gets the notification, which includes the vendor name and reason code 'Invalid Account Number'.

nodes.task_description: Reverse the payment posting in the ERP system to reopen the vendor invoice.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully reverses the payment transaction.

nodes.task_description: Contact the vendor to obtain the correct banking information.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent contacts the vendor and gets the updated details.

nodes.task_description: Update the vendor master file and re-process the payment in the next payment run.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent updates the vendor record and reschedules the payment.
